alert: Users are receiving intermittent 429 responses during normal traffic.
root_cause: web server rate limit configured too low

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show many 429 responses triggered by the local rate limiter.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:web_server: Web metrics show elevated rate-limit rejects while traffic is normal.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:web_server:RATE_LIMIT_RPS: RATE_LIMIT_RPS is far below current normal load.

logs: WARN local rate limiter threshold exceeded rps=238 limit=200

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(web server rate limit configured too low, increase web rate limit)
distractors: The load balancer is not saturated; the rejects are emitted by the web tier.
